privileged_info_summary: The task involves reconciling disconnected transfer transactions in a synthetic Portfolio Performance XML file. The file is created at /home/ga/Documents/PortfolioData/disconnected_transfers.xml with two unlinked transaction pairs: (1) $2,500.00 transferred from Main Checking to Brokerage Cash on 2024-05-15, represented as separate REMOVAL and DEPOSIT transactions; (2) $1,200.00 transferred from Main Checking to Brokerage Cash on 2024-05-28, also represented as separate REMOVAL and DEPOSIT transactions. The agent must delete these disconnected pairs and create proper TRANSFER transactions to reconcile the accounts.
